title: Carry out non-structural vehicle panel repairs
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out non-structural vehicle panel repairs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for non-structural panel repairs

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and product manufacturer and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check equipment and hand and power tools for serviceability1.5 Plan work to minimise waste according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and product manufacturer and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check equipment and hand and power tools for serviceability1.5 Plan work to minimise waste according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and product manufacturer and original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check equipment and hand and power tools for serviceability1.5 Plan work to minimise waste according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for non-structural panel repairs

elements.title: Carry out non-structural panel repairs to pre-paint condition

pcs.text: Repair panels using required repair methods, materials and equipment according to OEM specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Finish repairs to pre-paint condition according to workplace procedures2.3 Obtain advice from required personnel if repair interferes with the vehicle’s trim or electrical and mechanical systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair panels using required repair methods, materials and equipment according to OEM specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Finish repairs to pre-paint condition according to workplace procedures2.3 Obtain advice from required personnel if repair interferes with the vehicle’s trim or electrical and mechanical systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair panels using required repair methods, materials and equipment according to OEM specifications and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Finish repairs to pre-paint condition according to workplace procedures2.3 Obtain advice from required personnel if repair interferes with the vehicle’s trim or electrical and mechanical systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out non-structural panel repairs to pre-paint condition

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
